initial_prompt:
Super-Eywa v1 runtime prompt snapshot.
Turn index: 1
Node depth: 0
Allowed decisions: ['delegate']
Prompt family: delegate
Base header prompt: ''
Selected prompt text:
Break the problem into a small number of genuinely useful subproblems for other agents.
Do not restate the original question in multiple ways.
Each helper should get one focused mathematical job that materially helps solve the original problem.
Choose the number of helpers based on the task. Do not hardcode the same helper count every time.
Use plain text only inside helper instructions. Do not use markdown, code fences, or LaTeX-style backslashes.

Return exactly one JSON object in this format:
{
  "schema_name": "eywa_node_response",
  "schema_version": "v1",
  "orchestration_decision": "delegate",
  "decision_notes": "optional string",
  "helpers": [
    {
      "label": "helper_1",
      "instructions": "plain-text subproblem for the first helper"
    }
  ],
  "synthesis_brief": "how the parent should combine the child results"
}

Question:
Solve this Super-Eywa grading-bank question.
Question ID: coding-S5-ahc032-mod-stamp
Title: S5. AHC032 / Mod Stamp

Problem:
Choose up to K = 81 placements of 3 x 3 stamps on a 9 x 9 board to maximize the sum of board entries modulo 998244353.

Grading target:
Score is the sum of final cell values modulo 998244353.
Higher is better.

Return format:
FINAL_ANSWER: <your answer>
JUSTIFICATION: <brief justification>
final_prompt:
Super-Eywa v1 runtime prompt snapshot.
Turn index: 2
Node depth: 0
Allowed decisions: ['execute_locally']
Prompt family: delegate
Base header prompt: ''
Selected prompt text:
Child results have already come back to you. Use them to produce the final response yourself. Return exactly one JSON object in this format:
{
  "schema_name": "eywa_node_response",
  "schema_version": "v1",
  "orchestration_decision": "execute_locally",
  "decision_notes": "optional string",
  "response": "string",
  "result_type": "optional string"
}
Additional instruction prompt profiles: []
System prompt:


User prompt:
Child results have already come back to you. Use them to produce the final response yourself. Return exactly one JSON object in this format:
{
  "schema_name": "eywa_node_response",
  "schema_version": "v1",
  "orchestration_decision": "execute_locally",
  "decision_notes": "optional string",
  "response": "string",
  "result_type": "optional string"
}

Synthesis brief from the earlier child-creation step:
The parent will take the 49 calculated weights from the grid_analyzer and pass them to the optimization_engine. The optimization_engine will determine the optimal set of stamps. The final answer will be the maximum sum obtained, taken modulo 998244353.

Child results already returned to you:
[
  {
    "node_id": "node_root_helper_01",
    "summary": "FINAL_ANSWER: [No board entries provided in question]\nJUSTIFICATION: Input board data is missing from the prompt."
  },
  {
    "node_id": "node_root_helper_02",
    "summary": "FINAL_ANSWER: Indeterminate\nJUSTIFICATION: No weight values provided to calculate sum."
  }
]
